title: Migrate /trade/portfolio route header shell

evidence.note: User approved the recommended next sequence after the Function Tree summary. Evidence maps the ArtDeco/impeccable line to docs/FUNCTION_TREE.md and recommends /trade/portfolio as the next header-shell-only migration.

non_goals: Do not change router configuration or route paths.
Do not change backend API contracts or frontend API clients.
Do not extract runtime status strips, review segments, table panels, or route business state in this node.

commit_gate: GitNexus impact before editing Portfolio.vue and GitNexus staged scope gate before commit.
Focused E2E for Trade-Portfolio or the nearest existing portfolio route suite must pass.
ArtDeco token check, npx impeccable --json, focused eslint, npm run type-check -- --pretty false, and OpenSpec/Function Tree validation must pass.
closeout_gate: Publish a route-header-shell migration report under docs/reports/tasks/ before commit.
Confirm no router, API contract, frontend API client, or shared business state changes were made.

transitions.note: User approved continuing the Function Tree summary next sequence on 2026-05-31; implementation scope is limited to /trade/portfolio header-shell-only migration gates.
